sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101624" key="sfa=s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφᾶς</orth> and <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφάς</orth>, acc. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφεῖς</foreign> (q.v.): but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφάς [ᾱ]</foreign>, acc. fem. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σφός</foreign>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφάττω</orth>, <sense id="n101624.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφάζω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφε</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφεῖς</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφεᾰ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σφέᾰς</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σφεῖς</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
